name: Aisa Bathhouse
description: If there's one thing that the women of Inazuma have in common, it's that they can appreciate a good bath. The Aisa Bathhouse's artificial hot springs are popular with many familiar faces. (Includes Ayaka, Yoimiya, Ei, Yae, Mizuki, Shinobu, Sara, Kokomi, and Kirara.)
